contact.address: 591 Notre Dame Ave, Winnipeg, MB R3B 1S6, Canada

about.mission: To provide a safe, nurturing, and inclusive environment where children of all abilities can thrive, learn, and reach their full potential through specialized care and evidence-based learning strategies.
about.vision: A world where every child, regardless of their unique needs, is empowered to grow, belong, and succeed.
about.story: Founded in 2015, Roots Empowerment began with a simple belief: that every child deserves a learning environment tailored to their unique rhythm. Our team of specialists, educators, and therapists work in harmony to create a 'home away from home' that celebrates neurodiversity.

values.title: Inclusion
values.description: We celebrate diversity and ensure every child feels they belong.

values.title: Empowerment
values.description: We provide the tools for children to gain independence and confidence.

values.title: Compassion
values.description: Every interaction is rooted in empathy and deep understanding.

values.title: Innovation
values.description: We use evidence-based, creative strategies for specialized learning.

services.title: Early Intervention
services.description: Specialized programs for toddlers and preschoolers to support developmental milestones in a playful, supportive setting.

services.title: Therapeutic Support
services.description: On-site speech, occupational, and physical therapy integrated into the daily learning routine.

services.title: Inclusive Classrooms
services.description: Small class sizes with high teacher-to-student ratios, ensuring personalized attention for every child.

services.title: Family Workshops
services.description: Regular sessions for parents and caregivers to provide tools and community support for the journey at home.

programs.name: Sprouts (Ages 2-4)
programs.focus: Sensory exploration, social interaction, and foundational communication skills.

programs.name: Seedlings (Ages 5-7)
programs.focus: Academic readiness, emotional regulation, and peer collaboration.

programs.name: Saplings (Ages 8-12)
programs.focus: Life skills, independence, and advanced social-emotional learning.

testimonials.quote: Roots Empowerment has been a game-changer for our son. The progress he's made in his social skills is nothing short of miraculous.
testimonials.author: Sarah J., Parent

testimonials.quote: The level of care and expertise here is unmatched. They don't just see a diagnosis; they see the child.
testimonials.author: Michael R., Parent

faqs.question: What is the teacher-to-student ratio?
faqs.answer: We maintain a high ratio of 1:3 for our younger groups and 1:5 for older children, ensuring every child receives the attention they need.

faqs.question: Do you offer financial assistance?
faqs.answer: Yes, we work with several local and national grant programs and offer sliding scale fees based on family income.

faqs.question: Are your therapists certified?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. All our therapists are fully licensed and board-certified in their respective fields (OT, PT, SLP).
